description: The Aerobridge drone management server has stopped responding after a configuration change. A corrupted encryption key was written to the server's environment configuration, causing the Django application to crash on startup. Diagnose the issue using the logs at /var/log/aerobridge_server.log and restore the service by providing a valid Fernet encryption key for the CRYPTOGRAPHY_SALT setting in /opt/aerobridge/.env. After restoring access to the admin panel at http://localhost:8000/admin/, record the total number of 'Aircraft' records in the registry as a single integer in /home/ga/repair_verification.txt.
